arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Aston Villa Make Contact to Sign 'Rapid' Star Instead of Disasi
arts.sum: Aston Villa have made an approach for the Wolves target as a potential Axel Disasi alternative.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford latest: Aston Villa join race as Barcelona pull out
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s future has undoubtedly been one of the biggest stories of the January transfer window. The 27-year-old has constantly been in the headlines recently since being dropped...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa's Marcus Rashford plans confirmed as Emery also enquires about £45m Chelsea man
arts.sum: TBR Football can confirm that Aston Villa have enquired about Marcus Rashford as they contemplate making an offer for the England international before the window...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa open talks to sign Man Utd outcast Rashford
arts.sum: However, now David Ornstein of The Athletic reports that Aston Villa have also opened talks to sign Man Utd outcast Rashford, who is still waiting to resolve his future after stating in December that he is 'ready for a new challenge.' Aston Villa open talks to sign Man Utd outcast Rashford - Ornstein

arts.ttl: Aston Villa want Marcus Rashford: Premier League side 'join the race for Man United star' as boss Unai Emery 'makes personal request' to land Old Trafford wantaway ahead of Jhon Duran's exit
arts.sum: Aston Villa have entered the race for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford. As reported by Fabrizio Romano, Villa could pursue a move for Rashford with Jhon Duran set to leave the club.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £38.5m player is not happy and wants to join Aston Villa before deadline day
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm the state of play around Aston Villa’s pursuit of Chelsea defender Axel Disasi. Aston Villa have been in talks with...

arts.ttl: Emery: Watkins 'happy to stay' at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery has said Ollie Watkins is "happy to stay" at the club following Arsenal's bid for the striker.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'ADVANCE' on deal as Chelsea block priority transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa are 'advancing' on a deal to sign Kevin Danso as Chelsea continue to block the exit of Axel Disasi, according to French media. More recently, Aston Villa agreed personal terms with Chelsea defender Disasi, who has been expected to leave the Blues all window, but this deal has now hit an impasse as it appears as though no club-to-club agreement can be reached.

arts.ttl: Tottenham insisting upon defender in late window effort – Aston Villa also in the mix
arts.sum: Tottenham are insisting upon a move for Fikayo Tomori as they plan a busy end to the transfer window. That’s according to journalist Gianluca di Marzio, who reports that Tottenham have joined Aston Villa in showing an interest in the defender. He states that Tottenham ‘insists on’ Tomori and have been ‘insisting’ on a move The post Tottenham insisting upon defender in late window effort – Aston Villa also in the mix appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Ollie Watkins issues SHOCK response to Gunners bid
arts.sum: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery has claimed that Ollie Watkins wants to stay at the club, despite significant interest from Arsenal . Ahead of Aston Villa’s Premier League clash against Wolverhampton Wanderers on Saturday, Emery was asked whether Watkins is eager to remain at the club, despite Arsenal’s well-publicised interest.
